extortion.description: [AI generated] The Wardlaw-Hartridge School is a private, nonsectarian, coeducational day school located in Edison, New Jersey. Open from PreK-3 through 12th Grade, it provides college preparatory education. It focuses on academic excellence, global awareness and character development, in order to ensure students become responsible, adaptable, and confident world citizens. The school offers a growing selection of arts, athletics, and other extracurricular activities.
